caption: A man with dark skin, glasses, and a large, stylized silver-grey wig is seated in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing on racks. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt and a bow tie. He is equipped with over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. To his left, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with an icon of a microphone. Another instance of "BOSS TALK 101" appears in red text in the background. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly as he talks. His posture and the surrounding environment, including the gallery wall of photographs and the nearby clothing, remain constant throughout the clip.
